case_title: RETAILERS NATIONAL BANK VS. MARY ROSE TAPARAN et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAR-24-2004 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST DEFENDANT(S). THE FEB-06-2004 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RETAILERS NATIONAL BANK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TAPARAN, MARY ROSE B $8,122.70 PRINCIPAL, $577.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $731.44 INTEREST, $200.30 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $9,631.44, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
